name: E-12 per-rule per-file cache: a corrupted cache file is recovered into a fresh state and the run continues
command: printf 'x\n' > in.txt && printf 'not json at all\n' > cache.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/run-detector.sh" --rule g-ts-001 --in in.txt --cache --cache-location cache.json --cache-stats 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && grep -q '"cache_recovered":true' err.txt && echo recovered 1>&2
